name: bugglo-mcp
description: MCP server for Robinhood Chain (4663). Rug checks, ownership, upgradeable-proxy and privileged-function disclosure, read straight from the chain. No API key, no account, no backend. Reports UNKNOWN as a first-class result — a check that did not run is never a check that passed.
author: itsnevu
//: zod is declared explicitly even though the MCP SDK also depends on it. robinx-mcp imports zod without declaring it and survives only because npm hoists it — under pnpm's strict layout that install is broken. Do not copy that.
